summary: Added maxEvents cap with FIFO eviction to PipelineMetricsCollector event arrays
notes: PipelineMetricsCollector now accepts { maxEvents: N } option (default: 10000). All 4 event arrays (_discoveryEvents, _cacheEvents, _transitionEvents, _prEvents) are capped via _enforceLimit() which uses FIFO eviction (shift oldest). 3 new tests verify cap enforcement, FIFO order, and backward compatibility. All 323 model-manager tests pass.
